The only obvious candidates for \\( f \\) that strictly fulfill \\(\\mho(f(a) - f(b)) \\leq \\mho(a - b)\\) for any \\( a>b \\) are:', '   - \\( f(x) = x \\)', '   - \\( f(x) = x + d \\) for any integer constant \\( d \\)', '', 'These cases satisfy the condition by preserving the structure of differences.', '', '### Conclusion', '', '\\[', '\\boxed{f(x) = x + d \\text{, for any integer } d}', '\\]', '', 'This includes the function \\( f(x) = x \\) as a special case where \\( d = 0 \\).
